name: dossie
description: Texas TREC contract intelligence for AI assistants: deadline calculator, holiday rollover checker, transaction-coordinator cost comparison, and Dossie product information. Built on TREC Form 20-17 mechanics with paragraph citations.

tools.name: calculate_trec_deadlines
tools.description: Calculate Texas TREC residential contract deadlines: option period, earnest money, option fee, financing, survey, closing. Applies ¶ 23 weekend/holiday rollover automatically with the ¶ 5B option-period carve-out correctly handled.

tools.name: get_tc_cost_comparison
tools.description: Compare Texas transaction-coordinator pricing across freelance / retainer / in-house / AI models.

tools.name: get_dossie_info
tools.description: Get Dossie product overview, founding-member pricing, and links to free tools.

tools.name: check_texas_holiday
tools.description: Check whether a date is a federal holiday or weekend that would trigger TREC ¶ 23 rollover, and what date it would roll to.

examples.title: Calculate deadlines for a Texas contract
Check if Memorial Day rolls a TREC deadline
